content.problemStatement:
Istiak is learning about arithmetic progressions. Today, he wrote an arithmetic sequence on a piece of paper. Istiak was very happy that he managed to write an arithmetic sequence and went out for lunch.

Istiak's friend Rafsan likes to irritate him by playing silly pranks on him. This time, he could have chosen one element of Istiak's sequence and changed it. When Istiak came back, he was devastated to see his sequence ruined тАФ it became a sequence a1,a2,тАж,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1тАЛ,a2тАЛ,тАж,aNтАЛ (possibly identical to the original sequence, if Rafsan did not change anything, in which case Istiak is just overreacting). Help him recover the original sequence.

Formally, you have to find an arithmetic sequence b1,b2,тАж,bNb_1, b_2, \ldots, b_Nb1тАЛ,b2тАЛ,тАж,bNтАЛ which differs from aaa in at most one position. bbb is said to be an arithmetic sequence if there is a real number ddd such that biтИТbiтИТ1=db_i - b_{i-1} = dbiтАЛтИТbiтИТ1тАЛ=d for each iii (2тЙдiтЙдN2 \le i \le N2тЙдiтЙдN). If there are multiple valid solutions, you may find any one.
constraints: the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 5тЛЕ1055 \cdot 10^55тЛЕ105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers a1,a2,тАж,aNa_1, a_2, \ldots, a_Na1тАЛ,a2тАЛ,тАж,aNтАЛ.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing NNN space-separated integers b1,b2,тАж,bNb_1, b_2, \ldots, b_Nb1тАЛ,b2тАЛ,тАж,bNтАЛ. It is guaranteed that a valid solution exists.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: Rafsan changed the third element from 555 to 101010.
Example case 2: No elements were changed.
Example case 3: Rafsan changed the fourth element from 222 to 101010.
